title: Yosys gowin build fails on case sensitive partitions because chipdb file name has case mismatch.
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.47+149 (git sha1 384c19119, aarch64-apple-darwin22.4-clang++ 18.1.8 -fPIC -O3)

### On which OS did this happen?

macOS

### Reproduction Steps

* Install oss-cad-suite on a case sensitive partition
* Fetch this gowin project example https://github.com/FPGAwars/apio-examples/tree/master/examples/sipeed-tang-nano-4k/blinky
* Build using yoays
```
yosys -p "synth_gowin -top blinky -json _build/hardware.json" -q blinky.v
nextpnr-himbaechel --device GW1NSR-LV4CQN48PC7/I6 --json _build/hardware.json --write _build/hardware.pnr.json --report _build/hardware.pnr --vopt family=gw1ns-4 --vopt cst=blinky.cst -q
```

### Expected Behavior

Build completes successfuly.

### Actual Behavior

nextpnr fails with an error message. It tries to find the file ``chipdb-gw1ns-4.bin`` but in the oss-cad-suite package it appears as ``chipdb-GW1NS-4.bin``.

Generating the oss-cad-suite package with the chipdb files name in lower case may solve the problem.

```
yosys -p "synth_gowin -top blinky -json _build/hardware.json" -q blinky.v
nextpnr-himbaechel --device GW1NSR-LV4CQN48PC7/I6 --json _build/hardware.json --write _build/hardware.pnr.json --report _build/hardware.pnr --vopt family=gw1ns-4 --vopt cst=blinky.cst -q

ERROR: Unable to read chipdb /Volumes/projects/work/apio-home-dir/packages/tools-oss-cad-suite/libexec/../share/nextpnr/himbaechel/gowin/chipdb-gw1ns-4.bin
```
code_blocks:
yosys -p "synth_gowin -top blinky -json _build/hardware.json" -q blinky.v
nextpnr-himbaechel --device GW1NSR-LV4CQN48PC7/I6 --json _build/hardware.json --write _build/hardware.pnr.json --report _build/hardware.pnr --vopt family=gw1ns-4 --vopt cst=blinky.cst -q

ERROR: Unable to read chipdb /Volumes/projects/work/apio-home-dir/packages/tools-oss-cad-suite/libexec/../share/nextpnr/himbaechel/gowin/chipdb-gw1ns-4.bin
